    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    I

    ingredients - Variable in class RestaurantGame.Ticket
     
    IngredientsList - Class in RestaurantGame
     
    IngredientsList() - Constructor for class RestaurantGame.IngredientsList
     
    isDayOver() - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantController
    checks if the day is over
    isTheSameIngredient(Toppings) - Method in class RestaurantGame.Toppings
    Determines whether another topping represents the same ingredient.
    isTheSameOrder(ArrayList<Toppings>, ArrayList<Toppings>) - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantModel
    Returns true if ticketIngredients is the same as orderIngredients, false otherwise.
